teaching.role: Teaching Assistant, Organic Chemistry I & Lab
teaching.description: Mentored 120+ undergraduates; developed supplemental materials improving exam performance by 15%.

summary: PhD organic/materials chemist with 6+ years in synthetic chemistry, purification, analytical characterization, and DOE-guided process development. Builds data-rich process windows and technical packages connecting reaction variables, purity, stability, scale-up, and route/process decisions.

bullets: Lead DOE-guided process-development experiments for bio-based polymer systems, defining process windows, analytical readouts, reproducible specifications, and SOP-ready scale-up controls.
Translate reaction/process variables, FT-IR/thermal/spectroscopic data, and material-quality outcomes into technical recommendations, structured reports, and repeatable procedures.

Designed, synthesized, purified, and characterized 15+ organic electrochromic material variants, connecting molecular structure, purity, stability, and performance with NMR, GPC, MS, FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, TGA/DSC, and electrochemistry.
Executed hypothesis-driven degradation and failure-mode studies, using analytical comparisons and structured datasets to guide route/material iteration and performance decisions.
Co-led AFOSR-funded process development for molecular thin-film coatings, optimizing surface preparation and CVD conditions to improve reproducibility and optical/material performance.
Integrated synthesis, processing, and characterization data to define process-property relationships for high-performance functional coatings.
Optimized polymer thin-film deposition under flow using DOE strategies and in-situ QCM-D monitoring to quantify growth kinetics and process controls.
Managed characterization/process-development lab operations for a 15-member group; implemented calibration, SOP, and safety systems that improved instrument uptime by 30%.

projects.title: Synthetic Route and Analytical Characterization
projects.description: Synthesized and purified organic material variants, then used multi-technique analytical data to connect structure, purity, stability, and performance.
projects.tech: Organic synthesis, purification, NMR, MS, GPC, FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, CV

projects.title: DOE-Guided Polymer Process Development
projects.description: Built experimental process windows, analytical readouts, and reproducible specifications for bio-based polymer scale-up.
projects.tech: DOE, SPC, FT-IR, thermal analysis, process variables, SOPs

projects.title: Process-Controlled Thin-Film Coatings
projects.description: Developed CVD/surface-preparation strategies for molecular coatings and translated process conditions into reproducible material outputs.
projects.tech: CVD, QCM-D, surface preparation, process optimization

skills.Process & Route Development: DOE, process optimization, route/reaction analysis, scale-up specifications, reproducibility studies, SOPs, technical reports, technology-transfer-ready documentation
skills.Analytical Characterization: NMR, LC-MS exposure, GC-MS, GPC/SEC, FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, TGA, DSC, QCM-D, cyclic voltammetry, chromatography-adjacent workflows
skills.Chemistry: Organic synthesis, purification, small-molecule materials, polymers, structure-property analysis, reaction mechanism reasoning
skills.Data & Documentation: SPC, Excel, Python/basic data analysis, JMP/basic, structured lab records, manuscripts, presentations, technical communication
skills.Materials & Scale-Up: Bio-based polymers, electrochromic molecules, thin films, CVD coatings, stability/degradation analysis
